betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Euphemium Armor§f

§aThe armor of total immunity — full resistance to everything, including radiation!§f

The §bEuphemium Armor§f set is one of the three endgame armor sets. It grants §cfull resistance§f to all damage types including radiation, and provides permanent saturation so you never have to eat while wearing it.

§6Pieces§f:
§b• §bEuphemium Helmet§f (hbm:euphemium_helmet)
§b• §bEuphemium Chestplate§f (hbm:euphemium_plate)
§b• §bEuphemium Leggings§f (hbm:euphemium_legs)
§b• §bEuphemium Boots§f (hbm:euphemium_boots)

§6Crafting Requirements§f:
Each piece requires §b24§f total §bEuphemium Compound Plates§f for the full set. These plates are forged in the §bPlasma Forge§f (euphemium cannot be stamped).

Each compound plate requires: Euphemium Ingot×4 + Astatine Powder×3 + Bismuth Powder + Volcanic Gem + §bOsmiridium Ingot§f

Additionally, the chestplate requires a §bBroken Pocket Watch§f, which needs §bYharonite Billets§f from the DFC.

§6Properties§f:
§b• Full damage resistance
§b• Complete radiation immunity
§b• Permanent saturation (no hunger loss)
§b• Does NOT require power

§eTip§f: Euphemium armor is the most accessible of the three endgame armors since it doesn't require the DNT or Fau-specific progression. However, it still needs osmiridium (from Gerald) and yharonite (from DFC). Start with this set if you want good protection before tackling more complex armor projects.
